goro.name: Goro
goro.bio: The village woodcutter. His axe has stopped asking what it cuts.
goro.pitch: They burned my woodshed too, Kenji. Give me a share and my axe walks with you.
goro.broke: Wood is free. My arm is not.

kiku.name: Kiku
kiku.bio: A shinobi without a clan. Sells secrets, keeps a few.
kiku.pitch: You walk loud, ronin. Pay me and I will teach the dark to like you.
kiku.broke: Secrets are expensive. So am I.

sadao.name: Sadao
sadao.bio: Disgraced strategist. Lost an army; kept the lessons.
sadao.pitch: I have been redrawing one lost battle for nine years. Take me.
sadao.broke: Strategy without funding is called dreaming.

ryo.name: Ryo
ryo.bio: Lives in the pachinko parlor. Owes money to everyone, including you, probably.
ryo.pitch: Daiki-san! I hear you fight yakuza now. I will join for a modest fee. Think of it as a bet on yourself.
ryo.broke: No stake, no play. House rules.

keiko.name: Keiko
keiko.bio: Ex-consultant. Fired for being right too loudly. Keeps receipts. All of them.
keiko.pitch: You are taking on the Kurosawa-gumi with a briefcase. You need strategy. I bill hourly, results guaranteed.
keiko.broke: My rates are non-negotiable. Unlike your survival odds.

sho.name: Big Sho
sho.bio: Farmhand, former sumo hopeful. His handshake has put men in physiotherapy.
sho.pitch: City men hurt your family? In this village we settle that with a harvest. You bring the sickle, I bring me.
sho.broke: Sho works for pay. Sho has learned this the hard way.

bit.name: Bit
bit.bio: Fifteen years old, banned from four networks, builds drones out of vending machines.
bit.pitch: You're the merc everyone's scared of? Cool. I'm the reason the vending machines fear ME. Team up?
bit.broke: No creds, no code. I have vending machines to feed.

dice.name: Dice
dice.bio: Won his own citizenship in a card game. Lost it twice. Won it back with interest.
dice.pitch: Vex Kurono! I had 8-to-1 you'd die last month. Lost big. Let me ride along and win it back.
dice.broke: Casino rules, choom: no chips, no chair.

nyx.name: Nyx
nyx.bio: The Undercity's finest hands. Has stolen from the Ministry twice. They still don't know about the second time.
nyx.pitch: Take me along — you need someone who knows which shadows bite.
nyx.broke: I steal FOR pay, not AS pay. Details matter.
